title: elizaos Eliza (2025-01-17)
overview: Development focused on new features (Onchain Agent Transformer - transform any Eliza agents into unstoppable Solidity smart contracts deployed on 10+ blockchains), 2 bug fixes. with 35 contributors merging 4 PRs. Major work included various improvements.

features: Onchain Agent Transformer - transform any Eliza agents into unstoppable Solidity smart contracts deployed on 10+ blockchains
